results.name: V1 default-OFF: equivalent to vision-007 (no boost_level emit, no arbit stats, cooldown*0.5)
results.detail: fired1=True emit_keys=['topic', 'source'] fired2=False arbit_emotion=0 arbit_cd=0 lvl_consumed={}

results.name: V2 arbit ON: emotion_alert preempts fusion same-frame (boost cleared)
V3 arbit ON: boost level scales cooldown (dark=0.3 / motion=0.5 / curious=0.7)
V4 arbit ON: no boost no emotion -> normal path (no boost_level emit)
V5 arbit ON: boost does NOT bypass global cooldown (still skip when since<scaled_cd)
V6 arbit ON: emit interact.proactive_topic carries boost_level
results.detail: fired=True emit_payload={'topic': 'reply<用一句温柔好奇的话主>', 'source': 'scheduler', 'boost_level': 'motion_greet'}

results.name: V7 AST/grep markers present in proactive.py / multimodal_fusion.py
V8 arbit ON: same-frame emotion + boost + mm_ctx -> all suppressed for fusion/mm path
